Bead attempt adds golden evidence-shape tests for vLLM/Rapid-MLX/oMLX (AC-4), routing-decision session-artifact tests (AC-3), and CLI smoke tests for route-status/list-models JSON envelopes. Underlying evidence-exposing implementation was already in place (agentcli/routing_smart.go, internal/session/event.go) and is exercised by the new tests, satisfying AC-1/2/3/5.

verification_command passed: go test ./cmd/fiz ./internal/session ./internal/provider/... -run "ListModels|RouteStatus|RoutingDecision|Utilization|Golden"
rationale: All acceptance criteria for fizeau-b50ea3ef were satisfied and merged in
the previous attempt (commit 52dc454b, merged via f0c795a3).

Evidence by AC:

AC-1 (list-models --json): TestCLI_ListModels_JSONIncludesRoutingMetadata in
agentcli/list_models_cli_test.go verifies server_instance, context_source,
perf_signal, and utilization fields are present in the JSON output.
TestListModelsCommandJSON in cmd/fiz/main_test.go confirms --list-models and
--json flags are documented.

AC-2 (route-status --json): routeStatusOutput struct in
agentcli/routing_smart.go:798 includes selected_endpoint,
selected_server_instance, sticky (RouteStickyState), utilization
(RouteUtilizationState), power_policy, candidates with components
(routeStatusComponents with power/cost/latency_ms/speed_tps/utilization/
success_rate/quota_ok/quota_percent_used/quota_trend/capability/
context_headroom/sticky_affinity). TestRouteStatusCommandJSON confirms flags,
TestRouteStatusJSONOutputSchema confirms envelope shape.

AC-3 (session artifacts): SessionStartData and SessionEndData in
internal/session/event.go carry SelectedProvider, SelectedEndpoint,
SelectedServerInstance, Sticky (RoutingStickyState), Utilization
(RoutingUtilizationState). TestRoutingDecisionFieldsInSessionArtifacts in
internal/session/routing_decision_test.go verifies round-trip and JSON keys.

AC-4 (golden tests):
- internal/provider/vllm/golden_evidence_test.go: TestVLLMGoldenUtilizationEvidenceShape
- internal/provider/rapidmlx/golden_evidence_test.go: TestRapidMLXGoldenUtilizationEvidenceShape
- internal/provider/omlx/golden_evidence_test.go: TestOMLXGoldenUtilizationEvidenceShape
All use pre-recorded cassettes and verify stable JSON evidence shapes.

AC-5 (test command): All tests pass with zero failures.

No new code changes are needed in this execution.
